x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces the Tax Commission's open outcome data (assessment actions, open Article 7 petitions) and adds file_appeal — the net-new write workflow locked today inside PDF forms and the online filing system.

server.name: io.nyc.taxcommission
server.title: NYC Tax Commission
server.description: Agent-native access to the New York City Tax Commission — the City's independent body for reviewing property-tax assessments. Search published assessment actions (granted reductions / reclassifications) and open Article 7 court petitions from NYC Open Data, look up a property / tax lot, and — net-new — file and track a property-tax assessment appeal (Application for Correction) that today lives only in PDF forms and the Commission's online filing system.
server.instructions: The Department of Finance (DOF) SETS the tentative assessment; the Tax Commission HEARS the appeal of it. Use find_properties / get_property to locate a tax lot by BBL, borough, or block. find_assessment_actions searches the Commission's published reductions and reclassifications (outcomes only); find_article7_petitions / get_article7_petition cover the judicial escalation into NY State Supreme Court. file_appeal (net-new) files an Application for Correction; it requires an authenticated applicant and mutates state — confirm the tax year, tax lot (BBL), claim type, and any income & expense figures with the user before submitting, note the March 15/16 deadline, the $175 fee when assessed value is $2M or more, and the TC309 accountant's certification required at $5.4M or more. Use list_my_appeals / get_appeal to track status and get_determination for the Commission's offer or decision.

tools.name: find_properties
tools.title: Find Properties
tools.description: Search NYC properties / tax lots (the subject of an appeal) by borough, block, tax class, or free text.

tools.name: get_property
tools.title: Get Property
tools.description: Fetch a NYC property / tax lot (address, owner, tax class, tentative assessed value) by BBL.

tools.name: find_assessment_actions
tools.title: Find Assessment Actions
tools.description: Search the Tax Commission's published actions reducing assessments or reclassifying property (Assessment Actions, 4nft-bihw) by tax year, borough, block, or tax class. Outcomes only.

tools.name: find_article7_petitions
tools.title: Find Article 7 Petitions
tools.description: Search open petitions challenging assessments in NY State Supreme Court (Open Article 7 Petitions, aht6-vxai) by borough, petition year, or attorney.

tools.name: get_article7_petition
tools.title: Get Article 7 Petition
tools.description: Fetch a single open Article 7 petition by its index number.

tools.name: file_appeal
tools.title: File an Assessment Appeal
tools.description: File a NYC property-tax assessment appeal (Application for Correction). NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only in PDF forms (TC101/TC108/TC109/TC106, income & expense TC201/203/208, TC309) and the Commission's online filing system. Requires an authenticated applicant. Mutates state — confirm tax year, tax lot (BBL), claim type, and income & expense figures first; note the March 15/16 deadline, the $175 fee at $2M+ assessed value, and the TC309 certification required at $5.4M+.

tools.name: list_my_appeals
tools.title: List My Appeals
tools.description: List the authenticated applicant's own assessment appeals and their status — today visible only inside the online filing system.

tools.name: get_appeal
tools.title: Get Appeal
tools.description: Fetch one of the authenticated applicant's assessment appeals by application id.

tools.name: get_determination
tools.title: Get Determination
tools.description: Fetch the Tax Commission's determination / offer on an appeal (granted reduction, reclassification, or no change).

x-agent-skills.note: Each tool maps to one of the ten NYC common government-process Agent Skills via x-agent-skill.

prompts.name: explore_taxcommission
prompts.description: Search and read NYC Tax Commission records — Properties, AssessmentActions, Article7Petitions, Appeals.

prompts.name: dispute_taxcommission
prompts.description: AssessmentAppeal — file a property-tax assessment appeal (Application for Correction).

resources.name: NYC Tax Commission — profile
resources.description: NYC Tax Commission: 9 operations, 9 tools, verb “digitize”.

resources.name: Properties record (templated)
resources.description: A single NYC Tax Commission Properties record by id.
